name: bobster
description: CLI and registry for Bob skills, rules, and custom modes.

scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js
scripts.registry:build: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js registry build
scripts.registry:validate: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js registry validate
scripts.prepub:release: npm run test && npm run registry:validate && npm run pub:check
